mapper.insert: insert into book_borrow_order (order_no, member_id, member_card_no, member_name, member_phone, member_card_type_name, member_valid_date, total_book_count, is_finished, borrow_status, borrow_time, expected_return_time, remark, dept_id, first_staff_id, first_staff_name, last_staff_id, last_staff_name, created_at) values (#{orderNo}, #{memberId}, #{memberCardNo}, #{memberName}, #{memberPhone}, #{memberCardTypeName}, #{memberValidDate}, #{totalBookCount}, 0, 1, now(), #{expectedReturnTime}, #{remark}, #{deptId}, #{firstStaffId}, #{firstStaffName}, #{firstStaffId}, #{firstStaffName}, now())
mapper.select: select * from book_borrow_order where id = #{id} and is_del = 0
select * from book_borrow_order where order_no = #{orderNo} and is_del = 0
select * from book_borrow_order where member_id = #{memberId} and is_del = 0 order by created_at desc

select * from book_borrow_order
is_del = 0
and member_phone like concat('%', #{phone}, '%')
and borrow_status = #{status}
and dept_id in
#{deptId}
order by created_at desc, id desc
select count(1) from book_borrow_order where is_del = 0 and dept_id = #{deptId} and borrow_time >= current_date() and borrow_time < date_add(current_date(), interval 1 day)
select count(1) from book_borrow_order where is_del = 0 and first_staff_id = #{staffId} and borrow_time >= current_date() and borrow_time < date_add(current_date(), interval 1 day)
select count(1) from book_borrow_order where member_id = #{memberId} and is_del = 0
